prestazioni: 1JZ-GTE (non-VVTi) engine rebuild with forged internals: Tomei 87mm forged pistons (8.5:1 compression), Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and a Tomei Type-M 264° camshaft kit for optimized high-RPM power delivery (targeting 600+ hp with forced induction).

Forced induction upgrade: Garrett GTX4202R turbocharger (88mm compressor wheel, .82 A/R turbine housing) paired with a custom 3.5-inch stainless steel turbo manifold (JUN Auto or HKS design) and a Tomei M82 blow-off valve for precise boost control (22-24 psi peak).

Fuel system overhaul: Dual Walbro 450 LPH fuel pumps, ID1000x injectors (or Nismo 740cc for staged injection), and a Link G4+ Xtreme standalone ECU with custom 1JZ-GTE non-VVTi base maps (including flex-fuel compatibility and launch control for drag applications). Suspension: Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (JZX100-specific valving) with Cusco front and rear strut tower bars, plus polyurethane bushings (Whiteline or SuperPro) for chassis rigidity.
estetica: Vertex Lang II widebody kit (JZX100-specific, 30mm front/40mm rear fender flares) with custom carbon fiber front splitter (Seibon or Varis) and a Voltex Type-3 rear wing (adjustable angle, 3D carbon construction).
Work Meister S1 3P 17x9.5 +18 (front) and 17x10.5 +30 (rear) wheels with Toyo R888R 245/40/17 and 275/35/17 tires, paired with custom extended wheel studs (BC Racing) for flush fitment.

Full interior overhaul: Bride Zeta III bucket seats (JZX100-specific mounts), Nardi Classic 380mm steering wheel (with NRG quick-release hub), and a custom roll cage (Weld or Cusco bolt-in 8-point) wrapped in Alcantara (color-matched to exterior). Full respray in Toyota Super White II (040) with matte black accents (3M or Avery Dennison vinyl).
